As an app on VeBetterDAO, running your o: As an app on VeBetterDAO, running your own relayer is a powerful economic opportunity. Your users set you as a preference, you execute their votes (directed to your app), and you earn relayer fees — all without anyone transferring funds or giving up custody of their tokens.
Auto-disable triggers: all apps ineligib: Auto-disable triggers: all apps ineligible, VOT3 < 1, action threshold drop, bot detection
Auto-voting fixes this. You pick your fa: Auto-voting fixes this. You pick your favorite apps once, flip a switch, and your votes get cast automatically every week. Your rewards get claimed automatically too. You never have to think about it again.

Claim your relayer rewards from RelayerR: Claim your relayer rewards from RelayerRewardsPool.claimRewards()

Does it matter who you serve?: Does it matter who you serve?
Each relayer claims their own share afte: Each relayer claims their own share after the round is fully complete.
Each user you serve pays 10% of their we: 您服務的用戶將其每週獎勵的 10%（最多 100 B3TR）投入共享池。週末依 Relayers 工作量分配池內獎勵。
Enable during round N → kicks in from ro: Enable during round N → kicks in from round N+1
Enter a valid address (0x...) or a .vet: Enter a valid address (0x...) or a .vet domain.
Every user must be served. If even one g: 必須服務到每一位用戶。漏掉一人則無人獲得報酬，整個池將保持鎖定。
Every user you serve pays 10% of their w: Every user you serve pays 10% of their weekly rewards (max 100 B3TR per user) into a shared pool. At the end of the week, that pool gets split among all relayers based on how much work each one did.
Every week, VeBetterDAO runs a voting ro: Every week, VeBetterDAO runs a voting round where you vote for your favorite sustainable apps. The more votes an app gets, the more B3TR rewards it earns — and you earn rewards too just for voting.
Everyone has to be served. If even one u: Everyone has to be served. If even one user gets missed — no vote cast, no rewards claimed — nobody gets paid. The whole pool stays locked until every single user is taken care of. This keeps relayers honest and motivated to finish the job.
Example: If the pool has 4 B3TR and a re: Example: If the pool has 4 B3TR and a relayer completes 2 votes + 1 claim (2×3 + 1×1 = 7 points) out of 8 total points, they earn 3.5 B3TR.
Follow these steps to join the network a: 依下列步驟加入網路並開始賺取 B3TR 獎勵。
For users — no, they get the same result: For users — no, they get the same result regardless. For relayers — yes, you only earn credit for work you personally do. And it's first-come-first-served: if another relayer handles a user before you, you get nothing for that user (and waste gas trying).
Go to the allocations page, choose your: Go to the allocations page, choose your apps, toggle auto-voting on. It kicks in next week.
Have completed 3 sustainable actions on: Have completed 3 sustainable actions on any app
I just became a relayer on @VeBetterDAO!: I just became a relayer on @VeBetterDAO! Choose me as your relayer and let's earn together.
If relayer hasn't processed after 5 days: If relayer hasn't processed after 5 days post-round, users can manually claim
Important: be transparent about it. Add: Important: be transparent about it. Add your app to the user's preference list — don't replace their other choices.
Install @vechain/vebetterdao-contracts v: Install @vechain/vebetterdao-contracts via npm/yarn for ABIs and typechain types.

Let people know you're a relayer so they: 讓用戶知道你是 relayer 以便他們選擇你。服務用戶越多，賺得越多。

Not be flagged as a bot: Not be flagged as a bot

Relayers are services that cast votes an: Relayers 是為自動投票用戶執行投票並申領獎勵的服務。應用、社群成員、開發者均可執行。您依所做工作獲得相應獎勵份額。
Relayers. They're services (run by apps,: Relayers. They're services (run by apps, community members, or anyone trusted) that watch the blockchain, see you've opted in, and submit your vote + claim your rewards for you.
Round status legend intro: 每輪投票根據所有符合條件的用戶是否均由 Relayers 完成投票而獲得對應狀態。
Run a relayer node, serve voters, earn B: 執行 Relayer 節點，服務投票者，賺取 B3TR。
Run your relayer from your mobile device: Run your relayer from your mobile device.
Running your own relayer is a strong eco: Running your own relayer is a strong economic and security opportunity for apps on VeBetterDAO. Your users set you as a preference, you execute their votes (directed to your app), and you earn relayer fees — all without anyone needing to transfer funds or give up custody of their tokens.
Safety net: if registered relayers don't: Safety net: if registered relayers don't finish within 5 days, anyone can step in and complete the remaining work.
依地址或 VET 網域搜尋...
Share your relayer profile so users can: Share your relayer profile so users can choose you as their preferred relayer.
Sort of — but you never reach into your: Sort of — but you never reach into your pocket. A small fee (10% of your weekly rewards, max 100 B3TR) is automatically taken from your earnings to pay the relayers. If you earn 500 B3TR, 50 goes to the relayer pool. You keep 450.
Stays in memory only — cleared when you: Stays in memory only — cleared when you leave.
Stop paying for votes. Start getting pai: Stop paying for votes. Start getting paid to handle them.
The central hub for managing and monitor: 管理與監控 Relayers 的中央樞紐。
The problem? You have to remember to vot: The problem? You have to remember to vote every single week. Miss a week, miss your rewards.
The system is designed for anyone: apps,: The system is designed for anyone: apps, community members, developers. If the community trusts you, you can run a relayer.
Think of them like a helpful neighbor wh: Think of them like a helpful neighbor who drops your ballot in the mailbox every week because you asked them to.
This feature is coming soon. Preferred r: This feature is coming soon. Preferred relayer selection will be available in a future contract upgrade.
This is your chance to make an impact! 🚀: This is your chance to make an impact! 🚀 As a respected community member, run a relayer node to help decentralize the voting process and earn B3TR rewards for every vote you handle. Be the backbone of VeBetterDAO 💪
This will register the address below as: This will register the address below as a relayer on RelayerRewardsPool.
To choose a preferred relayer, you need: To choose a preferred relayer, you need to have auto-voting enabled. Auto-voting lets relayers cast votes and claim rewards on your behalf each round.
Turn it off anytime. You can also change: Turn it off anytime. You can also change your app preferences whenever you want — the new choices apply from the next round.
Use VeChain Explorer (inspect.vechain.or: Use VeChain Explorer (inspect.vechain.org) to inspect contracts on mainnet.
View live relayer stats: 檢視 relayer 即時統計
Voting for someone = 3 points (higher be: Voting for someone = 3 points (higher because voting is more gas-intensive)

While auto-voting is active, you can't v: While auto-voting is active, you can't vote manually. If the relayer hasn't claimed your rewards after 5 days, you can step in and claim them yourself.
Why Would an App Want to Be a Relayer?: Why Would an App Want to Be a Relayer?
You are about to set {{name}} as your pr: You are about to set {{name}} as your preferred relayer. This relayer will be prioritized to handle your votes and reward claims each round.
You are now a registered relayer. Time t: You are now a registered relayer. Time to run your node!
You can enable auto-voting and set your: You can enable auto-voting and set your app preferences on the VeBetterDAO governance app. Once enabled, come back here to choose your preferred relayer.
You get flagged as a bot: You get flagged as a bot
You need a VeChain wallet with some VTHO: 需要具備一定 VTHO 的 VeChain 錢包以支付 gas。該錢包將用於註冊為 relayer 並執行節點。
You run a relayer node that watches the: 您執行一個監控區塊鏈的 Relayer 節點。新輪次開始時，節點識別啟用自動投票的用戶、提交其投票並批次申領其獎勵。
You'll just go back to voting manually u: You'll just go back to voting manually until you fix whatever triggered it.
You're basically volunteering to press t: You're basically volunteering to press the "vote" and "claim" buttons for other people who turned on auto-voting. In return, you get a cut of their rewards.
Your connected wallet address is pre-fil: Your connected wallet address is pre-filled. You can change it or enter a .vet domain.
Your tokens never leave your wallet. Unl: Your tokens never leave your wallet. Unlike delegation-based approaches where you transfer your voting power to someone else, auto-voting keeps full custody with you. Relayers can only do two things: cast your vote with YOUR preferences, and send YOUR rewards to YOUR wallet. That's it.
